name: cc-dm-editor
description: Native macOS Markdown editor built with Tauri

scripts.build:js: mkdir -p dist && cp src/index.html src/styles.css dist/ && esbuild src/main.js --bundle --outfile=dist/bundle.js --format=esm --platform=browser
scripts.watch:js: mkdir -p dist && cp src/index.html src/styles.css dist/ && esbuild src/main.js --bundle --outfile=dist/bundle.js --format=esm --platform=browser --watch
